title: ctenopteris leptostoma
intro: Ctenopteris leptostoma, also known as the tree fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a native plant of New Zealand, prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenopteris leptostoma include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
